scripts.build:remotes: npm run build -w packages/mfe-store && npm run build -w packages/mfe-forms && npm run build -w packages/mfe-admin
scripts.dev: npm run build:lib && npm run build:remotes && npm run build -w packages/shell && concurrently -n store,forms,admin,shell -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-store" "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-forms" "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-admin" "npm run preview -w packages/shell"
scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:remotes && npm run build -w packages/shell && node scripts/merge-dist.mjs
scripts.preview: concurrently -n store,forms,admin,shell -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-store" "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-forms" "npm run preview -w packages/mfe-admin" "npm run preview -w packages/shell"
